data.title: Create add-parameter integration tests against Python and TypeScript fixtures
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Create tests/integration/test-add-parameter-integration.sh — integration tests that run add-parameter recipe against real fixture codebases and verify semantic correctness.

### Tests:
1. test_python_add_parameter_updates_all_callers: Copy python-project fixture to temp dir. Run recipe-executor.sh with RECIPE_NAME=add-parameter, language=python, target function, new param. Assert: (a) all callers in 8+ files updated, (b) python fixture's own test suite passes after transform (cd temp && python -m pytest).
2. test_typescript_add_parameter_updates_all_callers: Copy typescript-project fixture. Run executor with TS add-parameter. Assert: all callers updated, typescript fixture compiles (tsc --noEmit).
3. test_add_parameter_idempotency_on_real_codebase: Run add-parameter twice on python fixture. Second run produces identical output. Fixture tests still pass.
4. test_add_parameter_determinism_on_real_codebase: Run 3 times, hash output files each time. All 3 hashes equal.
5. test_rollback_on_failed_add_parameter: Introduce a failure (mock adapter to fail mid-way). Verify fixture returns to original state (no partial changes).

Skip gracefully if fixtures not available (TEST_INTEGRATION_SKIP=1 or fixture dir missing).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/integration/test-add-parameter-integration.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/integration/test-add-parameter-integration.sh
- [ ] Tests skip gracefully when fixtures not available
  Verify: TEST_INTEGRATION_SKIP=1 bash tests/integration/test-add-parameter-integration.sh; [ $? -eq 0 ]
- [ ] Valid bash syntax
  Verify: bash -n tests/integration/test-add-parameter-integration.sh
